scripts.build:jekyll: cross-env JEKYLL_ENV=production bundle exec jekyll build
scripts.optimize:css: purgecss --css _site/css/main.css --content "_site/**/*.html" "_site/**/*.js" --safelist active show collapsing translated_review_disclaimer --output _site/css/main.css && cleancss -O2 -o _site/css/main.css _site/css/main.css
scripts.postbuild:docs: shx rm -rf docs && shx mv _site docs
scripts.ship: npm run clean && npm run build:jekyll && npm run optimize:css && npm run optimize:js && npm run optimize:hash && npm run optimize:html && npm run postbuild:docs
